name: Italian Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam or boil broccoli until tender. Drain and mash as you would potatoes, leaving small bits of broccoli.
2. In a large skillet, sauté onion and garlic in oil. When the onion begins to brown, add broccoli and stir to mix.
3. Add bread crumbs and cheese and stir until well blended. Remove from heat and add egg. Stir again to blend; add seasonings and stir again.
4. Place in a casserole dish and bake in an oven preheated to 350 degrees for about 15 minutes before serving.
